name: the-accounting-game-basic-accounting-fresh-from-the-lemonade-stand
description: Darrell Mullis and Judith Orloff's The Accounting Game — learn accounting through the lemonade stand method.
useCase: Learn the basics of accounting — balance sheet, income statement, cash flow — through the lemonade stand analogy.
knownRisks: Simplified examples may not cover complex corporate accounting scenarios
Tax regulations and accounting standards vary by country
